Miguel Brandão

Backend Engineer — Node.js (Express/NestJS) • Laravel / CakePHP • Ruby on Rails
Portimão, Portugal • miguellbwork@gmail.com • linkedin.com/in/miguellbpt • github.com/MiguellBrandao

Professional Summary

Backend Engineer experienced in Node.js (Express/NestJS), Laravel / CakePHP, and Ruby on Rails, focused on developing REST APIs, integrations, and automation. Experienced with SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MariaDB/MySQL, and MongoDB, alongside Docker and AWS/Firebase deployment. Complementary experience with Vue, React, and React Native when needed.

Technical Skills

Backend: Node.js (Express), NestJS, Laravel, CakePHP, Ruby on Rails, REST APIs
Databases: SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MariaDB/MySQL, MongoDB
Infra: Docker, AWS, Firebase, Git/GitHub
Frontend (Complementary): Vue, React, React Native

Professional Experience

W4M — Mid-Level Full Stack (backend-first)

May 2025 - Sep 2025
Laravel • Yii • SQL Server • PostgreSQL • Vue
  • Optimized backend APIs in Laravel/Yii, reducing latency in critical endpoints and improving system stability.
  • Implemented large-volume asynchronous imports via Laravel Queues + cron jobs, reducing direct calls to external APIs.
  • Executed SQL Server to PostgreSQL data migration, adapting custom queries and indexes according to product standards.

The Wave Coworking — Backend / Full Stack Developer (sole dev)

Jun 2024 - Jan 2025
NestJS • TypeScript • Next.js • AWS
  • Developed a NestJS backend for a ticketing system, integrating global payments via webhooks and automated PDF email issuance.
  • Implemented event management, premium users, and promo codes, including operational QR code validation routines.
  • Served as the technical architect responsible for software design and AWS deployment, ensuring a stable, continuous delivery operation.

HubAtivo — Mid-Level Full Stack (backend-first)

Mar 2024 - Aug 2024
NestJS • MongoDB • Leaflet • React
  • Developed REST APIs using NestJS for a real estate platform, integrating logic rules with MongoDB persistence.
  • Implemented search endpoints and geography-based filters, supporting map visualisations (Leaflet).
  • Mentored 3 interns in Node.js patterns and base frontend-backend integration concepts.

Octus Pay — Junior Back-End Developer

Apr 2023 - Sep 2023
Laravel • MariaDB • Frontend Web
  • Developed a Laravel backend for an online e-learning platform featuring REST endpoints for users, courses, and permissions.
  • Integrated backend APIs with administrative panels to guarantee data consistency and operational flows.

Smart Cities Lagoa — Full Stack Intern

May 2023 - Jul 2023
Python • Tesseract OCR • OpenCV • React Native
  • Developed a Python OCR system (Tesseract/OpenCV) for reliable, automatic water meter reading, eliminating entry errors.
  • Reduced a previously lengthy multi-hour manual procedure into a few minutes by coupling the system via a mobile app.

Freelancer — Backend / Full Stack Developer

Jul 2022 - Present
Node.js • Ruby on Rails • AWS/Firebase
  • Developing custom REST APIs and third-party integrations in Node.js and Ruby on Rails for on-demand projects.
  • Managing deployments and maintenance via AWS/Firebase architectures, guaranteeing steady uptime.

Projects

Irrivio Garden

NestJS • Drizzle ORM • PostgreSQL • JWT • RBAC
  • Built the NestJS API for a multi-tenant garden operations platform with JWT authentication and company-scoped authorization.
  • Modeled the PostgreSQL schema with Drizzle for companies, company memberships, teams, tasks, stock, quotes, payments, and reports.
  • Implemented consistent REST contracts across modules, tenant isolation, and role-based access rules throughout the domain.

Keymeter API

Express • Prisma • PostgreSQL • Redis
  • Developed a multi-tenant backend for event ingestion and analytics.
  • Implemented RBAC and API keys lifecycle management with strict scoped verification.
  • Integrated with Redis for rate limiting and daily data tracking aggregation saved in PostgreSQL.
